winter.translate: зимний, озимый, зима, год, зимовать, перезимовать
mnemonic: winter [(ув)и'нтэ] зима - (Выньте) зиму из времён года.

examples.eng: Winter has set in.
It was a long, cold winter.
Winter is drawing on.
Winter is approaching.
I need a new winter coat.
They spend winters in Florida.
We wintered on the Riviera.
In the holl of winter night.
The town is dead in the winter.
Snow is a phenomenon of winter.
Winter is almost upon us.
It was a gray winter day.
This has been a hard winter.
In winter, the days shorten.
My family winters in Florida.
the arctic air of deep winter
It was rotten cold that winter.
examples.ru: В ту зиму стояли ужасные холода.

examples.eng: Last winter was colder than average.
He had a stroke last winter.
examples.ru: Прошлой зимой у него был инсульт /удар/.

examples.eng: We have no winter habiliments.
He garaged the car for the winter.
examples.ru: На зиму он поставил машину в гараж.

examples.eng: Food was a bit scarce last winter.
examples.ru: Прошлой зимой еды немного не хватало.

examples.eng: The birds fly south in the winter.
She traveled there two winters ago.
the school's annual winter carnival
examples.ru: ежегодный зимний карнавал, проводящийся в данной школе

examples.eng: The winter was verging into spring.
Moscow gets awfully cold in winter.
examples.ru: В Москве зимой становится очень холодно.

examples.eng: Our outgoings are higher in winter.
This winter seems to last for ever.
examples.ru: Кажется, эта зима никогда не кончится.

examples.eng: Food was often scarce in the winter.
